title: Intermission
description: A chill building pack designed for playing with friends. Explore ruins and fight new mobs while you collect and build!
body:
This is the intermediary modpack in the Unfold line of packs, it is designed for use in between finishing one pack and while waiting for the next. It focuses on building and mild exploration.

Craft complex machines, mass produce metals, create massive structures, have fun with friends with tools like musical instruments and cameras! 

With new resources to explore, new building blocks, new tech, new atmospheric overhauls, this pack serves as a perfect overhaul to Minecraft.
